articles.title: US lawmaker warns Trump to ‘stop the war’ as Iran's deadly revenge strikes target American forces?
articles.description: US Representative Ro Khanna has accused President Donald Trump of violating the War Powers Resolution after fresh American strikes linked to Iran, warning that legal action could follow if the conflict continues. Khanna’s remarks frame the issue as both a constitutional clash in Washington and a growing political challenge to Trump’s handling of the crisis.

articles.title: Employer of hundreds of unpaid migrant workers back in Singapore: Manpower Ministry
articles.description: Ramu Palani Velu, a director of KPA Engineering and SK Industries, is assisting with investigations after hundreds of workers were left unpaid for months.

articles.title: Telangana govt considering moving SC against VB G RAM G Act: Minister
articles.description: Telangana's Irrigation Minister N Uttam Kumar Reddy revealed the state government is considering a Supreme Court challenge against the new VB G RAM G Act, replacing MGNREGA. A cabinet sub-committee is exploring joint legal action with Karnataka and Kerala. The government aims to protect states' powers and finances, with a final decision on adopting the central framework or enacting its own law due July 2.

articles.title: US-Iran war: Kuwait, Bahrain say Tehran targeted them with drone and missile strikes
articles.description: US-Iran war news: Tensions flare as Iran targets Bahrain and Kuwait with drone and missile attacks following U.S. airstrikes on Iranian military sites. This escalation jeopardizes a regional ceasefire, with the U.S. retaliating after an oil tanker was struck. Former President Trump issued a stark warning, suggesting a point of no return for Iran if hostilities continue.

articles.title: 'Only Mamata supporters being harassed': TMC MLA Kunal Ghosh slams Suvendu-led govt over 'selective targeting'
articles.description: Ghosh questioned why the CM was not taking action on those whose signatures appeared on the documents approving Taratala building plan

articles.title: Director who left over 400 Indian, Bangladeshi migrants unpaid returns to Singapore: Minister
articles.description: An Indian-origin permanent resident, accused of abandoning over 400 migrant workers without pay, has returned to Singapore. His passport has been impounded as authorities vow strict enforcement of labor laws. Support is being provided to the affected workers, with efforts underway to secure new jobs for them, and many are expected to be placed soon.

articles.title: ‘They Will Never Learn’: Trump Orders Fresh Strikes On Iran After Drone Attack, Issues Dire Warning
articles.description: Fresh tensions have erupted in the Middle East after the United States launched airstrikes on multiple Iranian military targets following alleged drone attacks on commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. President Donald Trump accused Tehran of violating the ceasefire agreement and issued a stark warning, while Iran rejected the allegations and defended its actions. The strikes have heightened fears of a wider regional conflict, threatened global shipping lanes, and cast serious doubt over ongoing diplomatic efforts. With both Washington and Tehran hardening their positions, the fragile ceasefire now faces its most serious test yet.#USIranConflict #Trump #Iran #USAirstrikes #StraitOfHormuz #MiddleEastCrisis #BreakingNews #DonaldTrump #IranWar #USMilitary #Ceasefire #WorldNews #GulfTensions #HormuzCrisis #Geopolitics

articles.title: 'Was CM setting record of Ayodhya visits to oversee theft?' Akhilesh targets Yogi
articles.description: Samajwadi Party chief Akhilesh Yadav has sharply criticized Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath regarding the alleged Ram Temple donation embezzlement. Yadav questioned Adityanath's frequent visits to Ayodhya, suggesting they might have been to 'oversee ongoing thefts,' especially after an SIT report indicated tampered CCTV footage.

articles.title: Who is Lance Schroyer? Trump picks former Oklahoma trooper to lead ICE
articles.description: Trump has nominated former Oklahoma state trooper and US Marine Lance Schroyer to lead ICE, calling him a "PATRIOT" with nearly three decades of law enforcement experience.

articles.description: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu praised the new trilateral framework agreement between Israel, Lebanon and the United States, saying it strengthens Israel while weakening Iran and Hezbollah, though National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir called the deal a "historic mistake."

articles.title: Quote of the day by Jennifer Aniston: 'Families are things to be forgiven. Who among us hasn’t tried - successfully or not - to forgive our family? I have forgiven' - A powerful lesson in forgiveness, healing and moving forward
articles.description: Hollywood actress Jennifer Aniston's simple yet profound words remind us that no family is perfect and that forgiveness is often the key to finding peace. Drawing from her own life, she explains why letting go of resentment is healthier than holding on to anger. Her message offers a simple yet powerful lesson about healing, acceptance and moving forward. Read on!

articles.title: ‘Mini Mamdanis Taking Over?’: Mike Johnson Sounds Alarm On Dems’ ‘Vicious’ Plan Against Trump Family
articles.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson has issued a stark warning over the growing influence of New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani, claiming that "mini Mamdanis" are emerging across the United States. In a post on X, Johnson called the trend "dangerous," urged Americans not to dismiss it as a joke, and said the country is in a fight to "save the Republic." His remarks come as Mamdani-backed progressive candidates continue to gain momentum, fueling a broader political battle between Republicans and the Democratic Party's rising left wing ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.

articles.title: Iran's Explosive Warning To Trump: 'Any US Violation Will Face Swift Response' | Watch
articles.description: The Iran-U.S. ceasefire is under fresh strain as former IRGC commander Mohsen Rezaee accuses Washington of violating the truce and warns of a "swift and decisive" response. Tehran says recent strikes against U.S. targets were defensive retaliation after American attacks, while the U.S. maintains it acted in response to an Iranian drone strike in the Strait of Hormuz. Will this latest exchange push the region toward another major confrontation? Watch the full report for all the latest developments.

articles.title: Anti-drug awareness rally held in Hubballi
articles.description: Hundreds of students, teachers, and people from different walks of life participated in the Anti-Drug Awareness Rally to sensitise the youths and the general public about the harmful effects of drug abuse in Hubballi on Saturday.

articles.title: 'Not targeted at India': US envoy Sergio Gor defends Trump's H-1B visa changes
articles.description: US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor assured that H-1B visa changes are not India-specific but part of a broader immigration review. He drew parallels with India's stance on illegal migration, emphasizing the US aims to secure its borders. Gor highlighted continued strong people-to-people ties, trade, and defense cooperation, despite the visa program's ongoing adjustments. The US embassy remains a busy hub for visa processing, underscoring the enduring bilateral relationship.
